standard: Cho mấy mẹ đó cãi, mấy mẹ cãi thôi rồi.

standard: Họ thấy mình, họ không cho chơi đâu.
A: They saw me, and they won't let me play.
B: They see me, they won't let me play.
C: They see me, they won't let me play at all.

standard: bà về đây cho nó đi ăn bánh xèo chứ không ai rủ nó kìa
A: She came here to take him to eat Vietnamese pancakes, nobody invited him.
B: Come back here and take it to eat bánh xèo, otherwise no one is inviting it.
C: Come back here and take it to eat bánh xèo, no one else is inviting it anyway

standard: Mày chuẩn bị rước dâu bằng xe gì?
A: What kind of car are you planning to use for the wedding procession?
B: What car are you preparing to use for the bridal procession?
C: What car are you using to fetch the bride?

standard: ừ cái chỗ này có vía hay sao á?
A: Yeah, this place seems to have some kind of magic or something.
B: Yeah, does this place have some kind of bad energy or something?
C: Yeah, does this place have good vibes or something?

standard: sau này có đi đâu thì xem dự báo thời tiết hộ tao.
A: Next time you go anywhere, please check the weather forecast for me.
B: In the future, whenever you go anywhere, please check the weather forecast for me.
C: From now on, whenever you go somewhere, check the weather forecast for me.

standard: Mệt với thanh niên Nghệ An này dữ nhỉ?
A: I'm so fed up with these young people from Nghe An, aren't I?
B: I'm so exhausted with this guy from Nghe An, aren't I?
C: I'm so tired of this young man from Nghệ An.

standard: Tối nay có thể nói là lo lắng không ngủ được.
A: Tonight I'm so worried I can't sleep.
B: I could say that I'm so anxious tonight that I can't sleep.
C: Tonight, I could say I'm worried and can't sleep.

standard: Rồi đi được đóng phí đường bộ đó, vào dụ làm gì?
A: Then, after paying the road toll, what's the point of getting involved?
B: Then you can pay the road fee, why get involved in that trick?
C: Then you go pay that road fee, what's the point of going in then?

standard: Thấy nói vậy chứ ai biết đâu em, sợ em vay.
A: That's what they say, but who knows for sure? They're afraid you'll borrow money.
B: I hear people saying that, but who knows, I'm afraid you're borrowing.
C: People say that, but how would I have known, I'm afraid I took out loans.

standard: Bạn thì nhìn cô nào xinh là gọi vợ đúng không.
A: You see a pretty girl and immediately call her your wife, right?
B: You call any girl you find beautiful your wife, don't you?
C: You see any pretty girl and call her wife, right?

standard: Giờ có kêu lên Vinh mua đồ nữa không?
A: Are you going to ask me to go to Vinh to buy things again?
B: Are we still asking someone to go to Vinh to buy things now?
C: Are we calling to go to Vinh to buy stuff again?

standard: cái này dễ trúng thật không chúng mày
A: Is this really that easy to win, guys?
B: Is this really easy to win, guys?
C: Is this really easy to win, you guys?

standard: nhìn kĩ đám mây đen giống yêu quái tới thật nhé .
A: Look closely at that dark cloud; it really looks like a monster is coming.
B: Looking closely, those black clouds really look like monsters coming.
C: Look carefully at the dark clouds, they really do look like monsters coming.

standard: ừ bạn nói cho hay vậy chứ làm gì có bạn nhỉ?
A: Yeah, you're saying that to sound good, but there's no such thing, is there?
B: Yeah, you make it sound great, but do I even have any friends?
C: Yeah, you say it's nice, but how could there even be a you?

standard: Nghệ sĩ đâu rồi ra mà giúp dân đi kìa , hôm bữa có mấy đứa hỏi "không có nghệ sĩ thì ai giúp dân?". Đâu rồi kìa
A: Where are the artists? Come out and help the people! The other day, some people asked, "If there are no artists, who will help the people?" Where are they?
B: Where are the artists? Come out and help the people. The other day, some people asked, "If there are no artists, then who will help the people?" Where are they now?
C: Artists, where are you? Come out and help the people. The other day, some people were asking "without artists, who will help the people?" Where are you now?

standard: Đội này lớn rồi mà còn chơi bẩn nhỉ?
A: This team is so big, yet they still play dirty, huh?
B: This team is already so big, yet they still play dirty, don't they?
C: This team is all grown up but still plays dirty, huh?

standard: Có lẽ cũng sắm áo phao đi nhỉ?
A: Maybe we should get some life jackets too?
B: Maybe I should get a puffer jacket too?
C: Maybe I should get a life jacket too?

standard: Anh tặng nhiều hơn đi chứ từng đó thì ăn thua gì.
A: You should give more; that's nothing.
B: Give more; that amount is nothing.
C: Give more than that, because what's the point of just that amount.

standard: ở Đông Hà thì làm liền cho rồi chi nữa
A: In Dong Ha, just do it right away, what else is there to do?
B: If you're in Dong Ha, just do it right away, why wait?
C: In Đông Hà, [we] just get it done right away, so what's there to worry about anymore

standard: Sao không nói rõ ràng gì nhỉ? Đăng lên mà bực á.
A: Why didn't they just say something clear? Posting this makes me angry.
B: Why isn't it clearly stated? Posting this is just frustrating.
C: Why wasn't it clearly explained? Posted this and I'm annoyed.

standard: Quê ta năm nào cũng khổ quen rồi. Giờ nhìn cảnh này mà đau lòng.
A: My hometown is used to hardship every year. Seeing this now breaks my heart.
B: Our hometown has been used to suffering every year. Now, looking at this scene, my heart aches.
C: Our hometown suffers every year, we've grown used to it. Now seeing this scene is just heartbreaking.

standard: Cổ cải ăn một lúc tối ngủ nằm thấy luôn
A: I ate some cabbage and then went to sleep and dreamt about it.
B: I ate some mustard greens for a while, and when I lay down to sleep at night, I could still feel them.
C: I ate some radish and immediately dreamed about it that night

standard: Có nam bắc rồi không cần bão nữa đâu nhỉ?
A: With the north and south now in place, we don't need a storm anymore, right?
B: Now that we have North and South, we don't need storms anymore, right?
C: We already have Nam Bắc, so we don't need Bão anymore, right?
